title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Knight Frank India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Knight Frank India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
